pois.name: Café Avissinia
pois.description: A beloved Athens institution nestled in the heart of the flea market, serving rich Greek coffee and mezedes since 1975. Catch live laïka music on weekends when the neighbourhood fills with the scent of grilled meat and the sound of bouzouki.

pois.name: Varoulko Seaside
pois.description: Michelin-starred seafood restaurant by chef Lefteris Lazarou. Perched above the marina of Mikrolimano, offering breathtaking sea views and exceptional modern Greek cuisine that celebrates the Aegean's finest catch.

pois.name: Little Kook
pois.description: A fairy-tale café decorated with spectacular seasonal themes that change every few months. Famous for its elaborate interior design and magical atmosphere that draws both locals and tourists into a world of whimsy.

pois.name: The Clumsies
pois.description: Ranked among the World's 50 Best Bars. A multi-space bar-restaurant concept that serves creative cocktails in a warm, book-filled environment. Beloved by Athenians for its innovative drinks and unpretentious vibe.

pois.name: Feyrouz
pois.description: Authentic Lebanese cuisine in a vibrant setting in Psyrri. Known for its generous mezze platters, fresh pita bread baked on-site daily, and warm Mediterranean hospitality that makes every visit feel like a family gathering.

pois.name: Ariston Bakery
pois.description: A legendary Athenian bakery operating since 1910. Famous for its tiropita (cheese pie) and spanakopita baked fresh throughout the day. An unmissable spot for a quick and deeply authentic Athenian snack.

pois.name: Souvlaki Street
pois.description: The ultimate Athenian street-food experience. Perfectly charred pork skewers wrapped in thick, hand-made pita with tzatziki, tomatoes and red onion. Queue early — supplies run out by midday on weekends.

pois.name: Baba Au Rum
pois.description: One of Athens' most critically acclaimed cocktail bars. Head bartender Thanos Prunarus crafts visionary drinks inspired by world spirits and seasonal Greek botanicals. The rum collection alone numbers over 400 bottles.

pois.name: Kuzina
pois.description: A rooftop restaurant with an uninterrupted view of the Acropolis. Chef Aris Tsanaklidis blends traditional Greek flavors with contemporary technique to create a dining experience worthy of the iconic backdrop.

pois.name: Lukumades
pois.description: A stone's throw from the Acropolis Museum, this tiny counter serves exceptional loukoumades — crispy Greek honey donuts — piping hot, drizzled with Thyme honey and dusted generously with cinnamon and crushed walnuts.
